name: Zero Risk - L1 Master Journey Orchestrator (Sprint 8C)

meta.description: L1 Master Journey FSM · iso-comportamental con Vercel src/lib/journey-orchestrator/dispatch.ts. Webhook entry POST /webhook/l1-dispatch. Reads/writes client_journey_state Supabase via PostgREST. Dispatches L2 per journey (ONBOARD HTTP · PRODUCE n8n NEXUS · ALWAYS_ON HTTP · 3 stubs NoOp). Post-dispatch hooks WhatsApp + social fire-and-forget. Backward compat MANDATORY · misma tabla schema canonical.
meta.backward_compat: OPTION α · same client_journey_state table · zero schema change · engine='n8n-l1' marker in metadata distinguishes origin

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: false, error: 'invalid_request', detail: 'journey must be in JOURNEY_TYPES and trigger_type in TRIGGER_TYPES' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  client_id: $json.body.client_id || null,
  journey: $json.body.journey,
  current_stage: $json.next_stage,
  status: 'active',
  trigger_type: $json.db_trigger,
  trigger_source: $json.body.trigger_source || null,
  trigger_payload: { params: $json.body.params || {}, original_request: { stage: $json.body.stage || null } },
  metadata: { trigger_type_original: $json.trigger_type_original, last_dispatched_at: new Date().toISOString(), engine: 'n8n-l1' },
  parent_journey_id: $json.body.parent_journey_id || null,
  started_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
}) }}
